title: Dune
author: Frank Herbert
description: A desert planet, a noble family, and a political struggle over the most valuable resource in the known universe.

title: The Left Hand of Darkness
author: Ursula K. Le Guin
description: An envoy visits a frozen world and learns how culture, trust, and identity shape diplomacy.

title: Kindred
author: Octavia E. Butler
description: A modern woman is pulled into the antebellum South and forced to confront family history and survival.

title: The Dispossessed
author: Ursula K. Le Guin
description: A physicist moves between twin worlds with opposing social systems while pursuing a theory of time.

title: Neuromancer
author: William Gibson
description: A washed-up hacker is hired for a dangerous job in a world of artificial intelligence and corporate power.

title: Parable of the Sower
author: Octavia E. Butler
description: A young woman builds a new belief system while traveling through a collapsing near-future America.

title: The Fifth Season
author: N. K. Jemisin
description: A fractured world faces recurring catastrophe while people with earth-shaping power are feared and controlled.

title: Piranesi
author: Susanna Clarke
description: A man records the wonders of an endless house filled with halls, statues, tides, and hidden memories.

title: The City and the City
author: China Mieville
description: A murder investigation crosses two cities that occupy the same physical space but are socially kept apart.

title: Station Eleven
author: Emily St. John Mandel
description: A traveling theater company preserves art and memory after a pandemic changes the shape of civilization.

title: The Three-Body Problem
author: Cixin Liu
description: A secret contact with an alien civilization reshapes science, politics, and the future of humanity.

title: A Memory Called Empire
author: Arkady Martine
description: An ambassador navigates court politics, imperial culture, and a murder investigation on a powerful capital world.
